title: Break Statement in a Quiz Game

content.problemStatement:
A program is designed to guess a secret number between 1 and 5. It keeps asking the user for a guess. If the guess is correct, it should print a congratulatory message and exit the loop using break. Otherwise, it should prompt again.

Fill in the missing break statement to stop the loop when the correct number is guessed.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Try again.
Try again.
Congratulations! You guessed it!
